data:
Search results for "llvmlite ir builder add sub mul div sdiv arithmetic example":

Title: An Introduction to LLVM IR Syntax - Medium
URL: https://medium.com/@mlshark/introduction-to-llvm-syntax-06a262f762eb
Content: Arithmetic Operations: Examples include add , sub , mul , sdiv (signed integer division), udiv (unsigned integer division), and floating-point

Title: IR builders — llvmlite 0.45.0rc2+0.g47730fd.dirty documentation
URL: https://llvmlite.readthedocs.io/en/v0.45.0rc2/user-guide/ir/ir-builder.html
Content: The string op specifies the operation—for example, add or sub . The optional ordering specifies the memory model for this instruction

Title: How to use llvm::IRBuilder Create Add/Sub/Mul/Div? - Stack Overflow
URL: https://stackoverflow.com/questions/61207663/how-to-use-llvmirbuilder-create-add-sub-mul-div
Content: CreateNUSAdd will generate an addition operation allowing wrapping for signed integers but not for their unsigned mates.

Title: 3.4. IR builders — llvmlite 0.5.0 documentation
URL: https://llvmlite.readthedocs.io/en/v0.9.0/ir/builder.html
Content: `IRBuilder` is the workhorse of LLVM IR generation. A `IRBuilder` internally maintains a current basic block, and a pointer inside the block’s list of instructions. When adding a new instruction, it is inserted at that point and the pointer is then advanced after the new instruction. A `IRBuilder` also maintains a reference to metadata describing the current source location, which will be attached to all inserted instructions. If *block* (a `Block`) is given, the builder starts right at the end of this basic block. :   The basic block the builder is operating on. :   The function the builder is operating on. :   Append a basic block, with the given optional *name*, to the current function. The current block is also changed to the instruction’s basic block. :   A context manager which positions the builder either at the end of the basic *block*, if it is not terminated, or just before the *block*‘s terminator:. `IRBuilder.``add`(*lhs*, *rhs*, *name=''*, *flags=()*)¶.

Title: llvmlite/llvmlite/ir/builder.py at main · numba/llvmlite - GitHub
URL: https://github.com/numba/llvmlite/blob/master/llvmlite/ir/builder.py
